description_long: This object is a life-sized representation of a deer, featuring a slender, elongated body with a naturalistic brown coloration and subtle lighter patches on the chest and underbelly. Its most prominent feature is a pair of tall, intricately branched antlers that rise well above its head, giving it a majestic and mature appearance. The legs are long and thin, with clearly defined joints and visible hooves, suggesting agility and grace. The head is slightly raised, with pointed ears that stand upright and a short, slightly upturned tail. The surface texture appears faceted and matte, resembling carved or molded wood, with a hard, solid feel. This deer would be well-suited as a decorative or thematic element in urban parks, plazas, or landscaped public spaces.
description: A realistic, brown deer with tall, branched antlers, upright pointed ears, and a faceted, wood-like surface. The figure stands alert with a short tail and visible hooves.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the deer's head, antlers, chest, and both front legs clearly, with the right side of the body and tail partially visible.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the deer's face, antlers, and right side, with the left legs and body curvature more visible.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the deer's back, hindquarters, and the full length of the antlers from behind, with the tail and right legs prominent.
description_view_3: Rear-left view displaying the deer's back, left hind leg, and tail, with the antlers and head turned slightly to the right.
